criteria_results.description: Mobile view does not contain any '+' buttons or 'Add Object' menus.
criteria_results.evidence: In `client/src/pages/home.tsx` (lines 30-38), the mobile view only renders `Canvas` and `MobileBottomBar`. `ObjectToolbar` (which contains add object buttons) is omitted. `MobileBottomBar.tsx` has been refactored to remove the `MobileAddObjectPanel` and associated buttons.

criteria_results.description: For PM role on mobile, `MobileBottomBar` renders a button to add photos to a selected object.
criteria_results.evidence: In `client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx` (lines 79-93), the PM version (when `!isTech`) renders a 'Add Photo' button with a `Camera` icon when an object is selected.

criteria_results.description: For TECH role on mobile, `MobileBottomBar` renders only a checkbox/switch for 'Color by status'.
criteria_results.evidence: In `client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx` (lines 53-65), if `isTech` is true, it returns a minimal bar containing only a `Checkbox` and the label 'Color by status'.

criteria_results.description: Mobile Bottom Bar does not expand/slide upwards.
criteria_results.evidence: The refactored `MobileBottomBar.tsx` uses a fixed height `h-12` (lines 55, 72) and has removed all sliding logic, `Drawer`, or `Sheet` components.

criteria_results.description: Technicians cannot drag or resize objects on mobile.
criteria_results.evidence: In `client/src/components/editor/Canvas/ObjectRenderer.tsx`, `disableDragging` is set to `isTech || ...` (line 145) and `enableResizing` is set to `isTech ? {} : ...` (line 146). Also, `onDragStop` and `onResizeStop` handlers return early if `isTech` is true (lines 115, 120).

suggestions: Consider deleting `client/src/components/editor/MobileAddObjectPanel.tsx` since it is no longer used in the codebase.
